data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T10:10 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
Deacon checking in. I have work hooked - let me execute immediately per the propulsion principle.

The hook shows: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0r0s1f` - mol-deacon-patrol

I need to:
1. Update heartbeat first
2. Then check the current step of my patrol molecule
3. Execute it

Let me start.

content.thinking:
All previous patrol molecules are complete (4/4 steps done). The hooked bead `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0r0s1f` also shows all children as complete (✓ on all 4). I need to check if there's a current active patrol that isn't complete, or if I need to create a new one.

Let me check the hooked bead's status more directly.

content.text: All previous patrols complete. The hooked patrol `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0r0s1f` also shows all children done. Time to squash old wisps and start a fresh patrol cycle.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Patrol complete: all steps done, starting fresh cycle"
